subcodes.first_line: Verily thy letter reached Me, and I noted its contents, and the severe trials which surround thee from all sides. Be not sorrowful on this account
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @birth of Christ; purity; virginity of Mary, @Mary Magdalene, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
